name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed you cancelled recently — no guilt, no pressure, life happens. We just wanted you to know the door's still open whenever you'd like painless cleanings, modern tech, and a team that actually makes dental care feel calm.

If and when you're ready, here's 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it at checkout the next time you book.

If something specific didn't feel right — the timing, the experience, anything — just hit reply. A real person on our team reads every one, and we genuinely want to know.

Take care of yourself,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hey {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. No pressure, just didn't want you to miss it if you'd been thinking about coming back.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
